things.name: Ometepe Island
things.description: Twin volcano island in Lake Nicaragua - the world's only island formed by two volcanoes

things.name: Leon Cathedral
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage largest cathedral in Central America - walk the white rooftops

things.name: Revolutionary Murals of Leon
things.description: Sandinista revolutionary murals covering buildings - finest street art in Latin America

things.name: Masaya Volcano National Park
things.description: Active lava lake visible from the crater rim - one of the most accessible in the world

things.name: National Palace of Culture
things.description: 1935 neoclassical palace where the Sandinistas took hostages in 1978 - now a museum

things.name: Mercado Roberto Huembes
things.description: Nicaragua's finest craft market with mahogany furniture, hammocks and colonial pottery

things.name: Granada Colonial City
things.description: Spain's oldest city in the Americas on Lake Nicaragua with horse-drawn carriages

things.name: Laguna de Apoyo
things.description: Volcanic crater lake with clear water for swimming 30km from Managua

things.name: Tiscapa Lagoon Natural Reserve
things.description: Lagoon in an old volcanic crater with the silhouette of Sandino's hat

things.name: Vigorón
things.description: Nicaragua's famous street dish - yuca with chicharrón pork rinds and vinegary cabbage slaw
